items.summary: Investigate and fix the backend Motoko registration logic so that new users can successfully register with a username and password. Ensure the registerUser function correctly stores credentials, returns a success result, and does not throw or return an error under normal registration conditions.

Fix the frontend registration flow in Registration.tsx and the useQueries.ts registration hook so that errors from the backend are correctly caught, surfaced to the user with a meaningful message, and successful registration transitions the user to the login page.
